case_title: POPE, STEVEN E. vs. BARON, LILIA H. et al

docket_entries.description: OPPOSITION DEFT'S MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS FILED BY PLAINTIFF POPE, STEVEN E.

COPY OF PETITION FOR PEREMPTORY WRIT OF MANDATE; COPY OF NOTICE OF MOTION TO VACATE MUNICIPAL COURT JUDGMENT AND TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS THEREIN; COPY OF MEMORANDUM OF POINTS AND AUTHORITIES IN SUPPORT RECEIVED BY LILIA H. BARON.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF POPE, STEVEN E. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BARON, LILIA H. THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 182 PARNASSUS, SF, CA, LEASE FORFEITED, COSTS PER COST BILL. THIS IS A SUMMARY JUDGMENT.
